title: RubberDucky
description: Lightweight modpack with Create and ComputerCraft, created for the NSC CS Club Minecraft Server
body:
This is a fairly lightweight modpack containing only Create, ComputerCraft, and a few other decorative and utility mods to add some variety to the game. It is being maintained for the NSC CS Club Minecraft Server, but is available here for anyone to use if they wish! It contains a bunch of libraries not currently used by any mods in the pack, but are available to provide a set of resources for members to use if they want to write custom mods for the server in the future.

Server-side mods are included, but disabled by default, for the sake of keeping it all in one spot.

*Some custom mods may be unfinished or missing major features. Custom mods as of the most recent version are:*
 - [Currency Mod](https://github.com/nsccs/CurrencyMod)
